summary: Re-post of the same narrated USCIS "Need to register? Do it now" PSA, with stock B-roll (laptop typing, DHS flag, classroom) under a voiceover, caption text, and an ARR logo/URL end card explaining the Alien Registration Requirement. Spoken-narration informational content, not music-driven and with no genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: with the U.S. government as an alien?; aliens register with the U.S. government; and you are 14 or older; If you are a parent; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
